name_en: 💕【New】Circular Interlocking G motif inspired by the brand's heritage, adding a touch of elegance to leather accessories. This 1970s style motif appears luxuriously on this Original GG canvas cardholder, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details for a refined taste. The interior features multiple compartments for various uses.
name_cn:
💕【New】Circular Interlocking G motif inspired by the brand's heritage, adding a touch of elegance to leather accessories. This 1970s style motif appears luxuriously on this Original GG canvas cardholder, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details for a refined taste. The interior features multiple compartments for various uses.
Black and black Original GG leather
Black leather trim with contrasting stitching
Taffeta lining
Circular interlocking G details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818811
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
